no_anomaly_coverage.conclusion: 无异常。R004239和R004240为不同客户（客户甲、客户乙）、不同业务事由、不同发票（FP2025X0004233、FP2025X0004234）的独立报销，发票各使用1次无重复，人均金额（180元、181.67元）和单次金额（540元、545元）均未超标准，合计1085元未跨审批档位不构成拆分规避审批。
no_anomaly_coverage.query_conditions: record_id IN ('R004239', 'R004240'); invoice_no IN ('FP2025X0004233', 'FP2025X0004234'); policy docs 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md, 06_business_entertainment.md, 03_authorization_management.md
no_anomaly_coverage.searched_population: expense records R004239 and R004240, invoice usage for FP2025X0004233 and FP2025X0004234, employee E0008 records
